migrationRisks.title: A small number of hub documents are overloaded navigation bottlenecks
migrationRisks.impact: Readers must parse very large documents to discover canonical docs, reducing findability and increasing onboarding cost.

migrationRisks.title: Ownership and stewardship metadata is mostly absent
migrationRisks.impact: Future migrations and maintenance cannot be routed predictably to responsible owners.

migrationRisks.title: `docs/` root is overloaded with mixed contributor and operational docs
migrationRisks.impact: Role ambiguity at the top-level folder makes navigation unpredictable and blocks scalable taxonomy expansion.

migrationRisks.title: Large `.md` / `.ai.md` companion surface increases drift risk
migrationRisks.impact: Dual maintenance across human and AI companion docs creates synchronization risk without explicit parity checks.

migrationRisks.title: Historical baseline docs are mixed with active guidance in the same namespaces
migrationRisks.impact: Without separate archival taxonomy, readers can misinterpret historical baselines as current source-of-truth guidance.
